story_prompt: An armored, monstrous creature grunts and struggles to pull itself through a dense, muddy forest floor, punctuated by on-screen text, before a dramatic transition to the iconic studio logo and a final ominous silhouette of a warrior.

cues.audio_class: Heavy industrial engine roar / constant mechanical drone
Rapid mechanical stuttering / rhythmic synth pulses
